items.summary: Track image172647 candidate c01 before any pODMR alignment test.
items.next_on_success: Review TrackCenter final position/counts; if final_counts_kcps is healthy, design and verify a strong-pi pODMR alignment scan for the tracked candidate.
items.next_on_failure: Move to image172647 candidate c02 unless terminal evidence indicates image-frame drift or a route/hardware issue.
items.last_summary: TrackCenter completed successfully for image172647 c01 with final_counts_kcps=41.984 at tracked position [117.56465969838,117.7907973957936,115.70981080847378] um.

items.summary: Run a strong-pi pulsed ODMR alignment screen on tracked image172647 c01 before any Ramsey/T2star/13C work.
items.planned_scan: mw_freq 3.825-3.925 GHz, 31 points, 4 averages x 50000 reps, mod_depth=1, length_rabi_pulse=52 ns, mw_ampl=-5, ampIQ=5, freqIQ=50 MHz
items.next_on_success: Export terminal savedexperiment, inspect raw readouts/reference-normalized views, and decide whether c01 has a clear usable resonance for alignment. If yes, design bounded Ramsey/T2star; if no, reject c01 and move to c02.
items.next_on_failure: If zero averages/count gate with standalone track still healthy, treat as route/count-gate or drift evidence before repeating. If ordinary no-resonance data complete, reject c01 and move to c02.
items.last_summary: Old image172647_c01 pODMR remains failed/no-data due count-gate. A stale queued duplicate from the interrupted old single-submit batch was identified and superseded before execution; do not run old c01 pODMR unless new evidence explicitly revives it.
items.interpretation: pre-measurement count-gate/tracking failure; no pODMR resonance data

items.summary: Run one bounded standalone TrackCenter diagnostic at the last tracked c01 position after the pODMR in-run alignment/count-gate failure.
items.next_on_success: Treat pODMR failure as route/count-gate or rapid drift evidence; do not blindly repeat pODMR. Decide between fresh Imaging/re-image and a route-control review using the diagnostic evidence.
items.next_on_failure: Treat c01 current position as not trackable under current conditions; prefer fresh Imaging/re-image if image-frame drift is plausible before declaring c01 absent, otherwise move to c02 from image172647.
items.last_summary: Standalone retrack diagnostic failed low-count (3.278 kcps < 8 kcps). c01 is not currently trackable from the last tracked seed; do not treat pODMR failure as no resonance. Next safe step is fresh Imaging/re-image of the original region before further candidate screening.

items.summary: Fresh Imaging/re-image the original image172647 range after c01 pODMR/retrack low-count failures.
items.planned_scan: center [117,115,115.5] um; half span [5,5] um; 81 xy points; z offsets [-0.5,+0.5] um; dwell 0.005 s
items.next_on_success: Export with explicit YXZ axis contract, rank current candidates, and TrackCenter the best current peak before further pODMR.
items.next_on_failure: If Imaging route/hardware fails, block only the affected imaging action; if no bright peaks are present, search a different region.
items.last_summary: Fresh re-image completed and was exported/ranked with explicit YXZ/kcps axes. Top current candidate is reimage1804_c01 at [116.000,117.375,116.000] um; next TrackCenter this current candidate.

items.last_summary: Terminal strong-pi pODMR for reimage1804_c01 completed with healthy counts but no clear usable resonance/alignment signature. Raw signal/fitted-reference depressions were only about 4-5% versus the expected ~22% strong-pi contrast; normalization-only weak features are not sufficient. Reject reimage1804_c01 for this project branch and move to fallback reimage1804_c02.

items.last_summary: Terminal 4-average strong-pi pODMR for reimage1804_c02 completed successfully. Raw/readout-aware review shows a clear signal-only resonance near 3.875 GHz with about 13.8-14.0% depth, no matching reference dip, Gaussian center 3.876461 GHz +/- about 0.69 MHz, and healthy alignment counts. Accept c02 as the aligned-NV branch with lower-than-expected-contrast caveat; T2star/13C remain unmeasured.
items.first_avg_interpretation: provisional promising signal-only pODMR dip near 3.875 GHz; terminal 4-average review required
items.second_avg_interpretation: provisional only; two-average mean dip at 3.875 GHz is about 16% and signal-only, but weaker than expected 22% because average 2 is less clear; terminal 4-average review remains required
items.third_avg_interpretation: provisional only; three-average mean dip at 3.875 GHz is about 13.5-13.9%, signal-only but weaker than expected 22%; odd intermediate snake-order autosave; terminal 4-average review remains required

items.summary: Execute revised Ramsey/T2star scout on accepted aligned candidate reimage1804_c02 after initial plan exceeded drift cap. Revised plan: auto__ramsey, tau 0..8 us, 43 points, det=1.5 MHz, 8 averages x 50000 reps; advisory has no blockers and per-average window 581.8 s under 600 s cap.
items.planned_scan: tau 0..8 us, 43 points, det=1.5 MHz, mw_freq=3.876461010 GHz, 8 x 50000 reps
items.next_on_success: Export terminal savedexperiment, review raw readouts/normalizations, fit T2star only if Ramsey signal is visible, and FFT-check for 13C sidebands near det +/- 384 kHz.
items.next_on_failure: If count/tracking gate fails before data, treat as freshness/tracking evidence and decide retrack/re-image; if route/advisory fails, revise plan without changing hardware safety limits.
items.latest_status_note: Running healthy at protocol snapshot; bridge-touching work remains blocked until autosave/terminal state; terminal review must raw-export savedexperiment before fitting or 13C claims.
items.first_avg_interpretation: provisional only; first average has visible structure but low-frequency FFT components are among the strongest peaks and there is no average-to-average support yet; no T2star/13C claim
